data.title: Kalshi plans to launch a "parent portal" feature to strengthen restrictions on minors' use of the app.
data.description: Tarek Mansour, CEO of prediction market platform Kalshi, stated that the company plans to launch a "parent portal" feature, allowing parents to submit their identity information to verify whether their children are using their identity to access the platform. In addition, Kalshi will introduce a selfie verification mechanism, using facial recognition to further confirm user identity, thereby strengthening age restrictions and compliance management to prevent minors from using related services. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Crypto stocks closed higher across the board in the US market, with ALTS rising over 11.46%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.15%, the S&P 500 rose 0.8%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 1.59%. The crypto sector collectively rallied, with ALTS rising over 11.46%, HOOD up 10.41%, ABTC up 6.8%, COIN up 6.23%, and MSTR up 4.46%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Gold rose to $4,822, while silver gained over 1%.
data.description: According to Gate data, gold prices rose to $4822.36 per ounce, a daily increase of 0.65%; silver was at $79.815 per ounce, a daily increase of 1.11%. In terms of volatility, the BVIX was at 44.80, up 0.04%; the EVIX was at 66.54, up 1.51%. In the forex market, USD/CNH was at 6.81290 and USD/JPY was at 158.782, both slightly lower. Globally, the Euro Stoxx 50 fell 0.72%, the FTSE 100 rose 0.07%, and the DAX 40 rose 0.24%. In commodities, WTI crude oil was at $90.82 per barrel, down 0.80%; Brent crude oil was at $96.40 per barrel, down 0.52%.

data.title: Tether Increases Bitcoin Holdings with Recent Acquisition
data.description: Tether has recently transferred 951 BTC to its Bitcoin reserve address, according to CoinDesk. This move increases Tether's total Bitcoin holdings to 97,141 BTC. The address used for this transaction is labeled as 'Tether: BTC Reserve' and aligns with the address previously confirmed by Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino. This acquisition is part of Tether's ongoing strategy since 2023 to allocate up to 15% of its realized operating profits into Bitcoin.

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Rises to 37, Indicating Shift in Market Performance
data.description: According to NS3.AI, CoinMarketCap's Altcoin Season Index has increased to 37, marking a five-point rise from the previous day. This index evaluates the performance of the top 100 cryptocurrencies against Bitcoin over the last 90 days, suggesting a shift in market dynamics where altcoins are gaining traction compared to Bitcoin.

data.title: The US SOL spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $5.3641 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 15th, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of SOL spot ETFs was $5.3641 million. The SOL spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL), with a net inflow of $3.21 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $793 million. The second largest was the Fidelity Solana Fund ETF (FSOL), with a net inflow of $1.5169 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $153 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of SOL spot ETFs was $835 million, with an SOL net asset ratio of 1.71%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $981 million.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $17.1142 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (April 15th, Eastern Time), XRP spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $17.1142 million. The XRP spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Bitwise XRP ETF (XRP), with a net inflow of $6.234 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $399 million. The second largest was the 21Shares XRP ETF (TOXR), with a net inflow of $5.4346 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to -$20.4104 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs was $1.021 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.19%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $1.249 billion.

data.title: Florida and Massachusetts Recover $5.4 Million in Crypto Scam Case
data.description:
Florida and Massachusetts have successfully recovered approximately $5.4 million in cryptocurrency assets from a scam that evolved from a 'romance scam' into a crypto investment fraud. According to ChainCatcher, $700,000 has been returned to victims in Florida, while $1.3 million has been returned to victims in Massachusetts. The remaining funds will be used to continue efforts against crypto fraud.

Florida prosecutors revealed that victims of the scam were located across six counties in the state, with one victim in Marion County losing over $450,000. The state's cyber fraud enforcement department announced that $3.3 million was recovered in the first quarter of 2026. Since its establishment 2.5 years ago, the department has recovered a total of $7.2 million, with an additional $12.6 million in frozen crypto assets still under litigation.

data.title: Shenzhen Stock Exchange Adjusts Hong Kong Stock Connect Securities List
data.description: The Shenzhen Stock Exchange has announced an adjustment to the list of securities eligible for trading through the Hong Kong Stock Connect. According to Jin10, the adjustment includes the addition of Hesai-W to the list. This change will take effect on April 16. The Hong Kong Stock Connect is a program that allows investors to trade eligible shares listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange through the Shenzhen Stock Exchange, and vice versa. The inclusion of Hesai-W is part of the regular review and adjustment process to ensure the list reflects current market conditions and opportunities.

data.title: Matrixport-related addresses closed out long positions of 25,000 ETH, holding them for 65 days and profiting $17.32 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the Matrixport-related addresses have completely closed out their last 25,000 ETH (20x leverage) long positions, realizing a profit of approximately $17.32 million after holding the positions for about 65 days.

data.title: The BNB Foundation completed its 35th quarterly burn, destroying 1.569 million BNB tokens.
data.description: The BNB Foundation has officially announced the completion of its 35th quarterly token burn. A total of 1.569 million $BNB, worth approximately $1.02 billion, were burned on the BNB Smart Chain (BSC), reducing the total circulating supply to approximately 134.8 million. BNB's ultimate goal is to reduce the total supply to 100 million tokens, and this ongoing burning mechanism aims to support the long-term healthy development of the BNB Chain ecosystem.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Approves Pipeline Permits to Boost Oil Transport
data.description: The White House has announced that U.S. President Donald Trump signed several pipeline permits on Wednesday, aiming to enhance oil and petroleum transport between the United States and Canada. According to Odaily, the new construction permit has been granted to Bakken Pipeline for the development of pipeline facilities in Burke County, North Dakota. Additionally, Trump issued permits for the maintenance and operation of existing pipelines located near border areas in North Dakota and Michigan.

data.title: Arweave-Based AO Network Launches Staking Alpha Test to Enhance Decentralization
data.description:
On April 16, AO, a scalable blockchain network based on Arweave, announced the launch of its 'Network Availability Staking Alpha (NASA)' test program. According to BlockBeats, this initiative marks a significant step in the AO ecosystem, aiming to improve the availability and reliability of decentralized data networks through a staking mechanism. Currently in its Alpha phase, users can participate in network availability verification and earn rewards by providing data services to Arweave gateways and staking AO tokens.

In the initial trial, AO introduced an 'availability staking' mechanism, requiring node operators to stake 25 AO tokens to participate in the network and compete in terms of speed and stability in responding to user requests. The system allocates rewards from a monthly pool of 1,000 AO tokens based on nodes' performance in data services. This mechanism leverages the next-generation HyperBEAM architecture, enabling higher verifiability and trustlessness for gateway and routing services while significantly reducing operational costs.

The project team stated that NASA aims to establish a stronger decentralized economic model for the entire permanent network infrastructure, paving the way for future expansion into areas such as computational scheduling, data indexing, and network services. Although the current reward scale is small and still in the testing phase, the program is seen as a crucial starting point for the AO-Core economic system and will gradually expand to more network infrastructure services.

data.title: Thailand's GDP Growth Forecast Lowered Amid Middle East Conflict Impact
data.description: Thailand's central bank has reported a slowdown in the country's GDP growth during the first quarter, attributing the deceleration to the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. According to Jin10, the central bank anticipates that the GDP growth rate may further decline in the second quarter. Consequently, the bank has revised its baseline GDP growth forecast for 2026 down to 1.3%, a decrease from the 1.9% projection made in December of the previous year.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Spot Silver Rises 1% to $79.75 per Ounce
data.description: Spot silver has seen its daily gains expand to 1.00%, currently trading at $79.75 per ounce. According to Jin10, this increase reflects ongoing market dynamics influencing precious metals prices.

data.title: Trump issues permit to facilitate oil transport between the US and Canada (Jinshi Data APP)
data.description: Documents released by the White House show that US President Trump issued several pipeline permits on Wednesday, including one for a new pipeline designed to facilitate the transport of crude oil and petroleum products between the United States and Canada. The permit was awarded to Bakken Pipeline for the construction of pipeline facilities in Burke County, North Dakota. He also issued other permits for the maintenance and operation of existing pipelines in North Dakota and Michigan, near the border. (Jinshi)

data.title: Foreign Investment in Japanese Stocks Reaches ¥39.433 Trillion as of April 10
data.description: Foreign investors purchased Japanese stocks worth ¥39.433 trillion as of April 10, according to Jin10. The previous value was revised from ¥29.596 trillion to ¥29.518 trillion.

data.title: STOCKS | CITIC Securities Highlights Strong Performance in Auto Exports and AI Developments
data.description: CITIC Securities has noted that March's production and sales data from major automakers have exceeded expectations, particularly in exports and high-end vehicle sales. According to Jin10, the firm emphasized that the export of new energy passenger vehicles is becoming a structural strength due to high oil prices and geopolitical conflicts overseas. The market is gradually becoming desensitized to high oil prices and war factors, and CITIC Securities suggests actively seizing opportunities in high-growth sectors. The ongoing positive impact of AI on the internal combustion engine market, the approval of Full Self-Driving (FSD) in the Netherlands, and the high growth in the robotics sector are driving continuous industry evolution. Currently, the stock prices of leading companies have stabilized, and CITIC Securities recommends actively positioning for the second quarter's new catalysts.

data.title: High-Stakes NBA Play-In Game Draws Significant Bet
data.description:
A significant bet has been placed on the NBA play-in game between the Orlando Magic and the Philadelphia 76ers. According to Odaily, an account with over $2 million in profits has invested $490,000 on the Magic to win, with an average opening price of 49.9 cents.

The game, which began at 7:30 AM UTC+8, will determine which team faces the Boston Celtics in the first round of the playoffs. The losing team will compete against the Charlotte Hornets for the final Eastern Conference playoff spot.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Mythos Model by Anthropic Shows Significant Advancements, Citic Securities Reports
data.description: Citic Securities has highlighted that Mythos, Anthropic's latest model, demonstrates significant advancements in capabilities, surpassing previous iterations in areas such as coding, reasoning, and research assistance. According to Jin10, the model also accelerates research and development processes in industries like biochemical research, finance, AI training, and robotics. Despite its superior alignment, the model's powerful capabilities pose a greater risk of infrequent errors, leading to its availability being restricted to core clients only. Anthropic is backed by investments and computational support from Amazon and Google, with recent collaborations strengthening their partnership. Starting in 2027, the demand for Google's TPU is expected to reach 3.5GW, with the Google TPU supply chain likely to benefit from the expanding demand for training cutting-edge models.
